name: Carl Reiner's Cream Cheese Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the cream cheese and butter until smooth.
3. Gradually add the sugar, continuing to cream after each addition.
4. Add the finely chopped walnuts.
5. Fold in the flour until a dough forms that is smooth and well combined.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Flatten the dough with wet fingers until it is very thin.
8. Bake for 10 minutes.
